message:
feat(web): Enhance React Compiler with stats logging and CI rollback testing

- Add compile stats tracking (compiled, diagnostics, errors, skipped)
- Add build-time stats summary plugin
- Add CI job to test with compiler disabled (rollback verification)
- Improve debug logging for compiler events

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,6 +33,25 @@ jobs:
       - name: Unit tests
         run: bun test
 
+  compiler_disabled:
+    name: Quality Gates (Compiler Disabled)
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Bun
+        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
+        with:
+          bun-version: latest
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
+
+      - name: Unit tests (compiler disabled)
+        run: bun test
+        env:
+          VITE_DISABLE_COMPILER: "true"
+
   e2e:
     name: E2E Smoke Tests
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
